module-checks.check-1: Email template renders readable UTF-8 subject, HTML, and text fallback.
module-checks.check-2: Provider success and typed failures are mapped without leaking tokens.
module-checks.check-3: Missing provider config blocks send with operator-safe error.

scenarios.scenario-1: Verification email is sent to a normalized allowed email address.
scenarios.scenario-2: Provider 401, 429, 5xx, timeout, and transport errors map to safe internal codes.
scenarios.scenario-3: Logs never contain verification token, API key, or raw provider response body.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Never log verification links, tokens, provider API keys, or full provider response bodies.
